tags: Exponential backoff with jitter for relay reconnects.
events.content:
# Reconnect Strategy

## Background

The relay layer needs **exponential backoff** with *jitter*, and ***both*** matter under load.

### Steps

1. Detect disconnect
2. Schedule retry
   - with jitter
   - capped at 30s
3. Resume subscriptions

Use `reconnect()` directly:

```rust
fn reconnect() { /* backoff */ }
```

> Backpressure is a feature.
>
> > Even nested.

See the [spec](https://nmp.test/spec) and credit nostr:npub1ccz8l9zpa47k6vz9gphftsrumpw80rjt3nhnefat4symjhrsnmjs38mnyd.

![Figure 1](https://nmp.test/img/figure.png "Figure 1")

---

| a | b |
| - | - |
| 1 | 2 |

Also ~~deprecated~~ approach noted.
